description: Curated external execution-layer toolbox for AGN2.0. These mounts extend capability without changing governance, authority, or canonical runtime semantics.

beads.summary: Distributed graph issue tracker and structured long-horizon task memory for coding agents, backed by Dolt.
safe_capabilities: atomic task claim and status updates
agn_fit: supplemental structured work graph for repo execution
agent-visible task graph for delegated work and progress recall
boundaries: Do not replace AGN append-only canonical memory or governance records with Beads.
Do not let Beads become the sole source of truth for lifecycle, control-plane, or dispatcher state.
Treat Beads as an execution-support task graph and issue sidecar, not an authority surface.

superpowers.summary: Planning, TDD, subagent execution, and review discipline for coding-agent workflows.
boundaries: Do not treat Superpowers as AGN governance or authority.
Use it as workflow guidance, not a replacement for AGN lifecycle or control-plane surfaces.

browser-use.summary: Persistent browser automation for real website interaction, screenshots, extraction, and authenticated flows.
boundaries: Use for browser execution, not governance.
Respect AGN emergency-stop and review boundaries before running side-effecting web actions.

deepagents.summary: Batteries-included agent harness with planning, file tools, shell access, sub-agents, and CLI.
boundaries: Do not let Deep Agents replace Central Execution Unit judgment.
Do not let it bypass AGN review or control surfaces.

hindsight.summary: Long-term agent memory system with retain, recall, and reflect operations.
boundaries: Do not replace AGN append-only canonical memory.
Use as a retrieval and reflection sidecar, not as SSOT.

page-agent.summary: In-page web GUI agent with MCP server and extension-backed browser control.
boundaries: Use for web interaction, not desktop governance.
Do not treat page-agent as a replacement for AGN desktop or control-plane surfaces.

promptfoo.summary: LLM evals and red teaming for coding agents, MCP, prompt security, and regression testing.
boundaries: Promptfoo evaluates and red-teams AGN surfaces; it does not govern them.
Keep Promptfoo in the validation lane, not the authority lane.

insforge.summary: Agent-friendly backend semantic layer for auth, database, storage, functions, model gateway, and deployment.
boundaries: Do not let backend convenience bypass AGN control-plane or review posture.
Treat InsForge as execution-layer backend capability, not governance.

academic-writing-prompts.summary: Prompt patterns for academic writing, literature review, section drafting, and scholarly language revision.
boundaries: Use as writing support, not as factual authority.
References and claims still require explicit verification.
